title: Challenge Lab: API Gateway - Creating Resources and Methods

tasks.title: Sign into the AWS Management Console

steps.text: Click Open Console to access the AWS Console in a new tab.
On the AWS sign-in page, leave the Account ID as default, copy your Username and Password from the Lab Console, and sign in.
Set the AWS Region to US East (N. Virginia) us-east-1.
Sign into the AWS Management Console

XYZ Company wants to create a REST API using Amazon API Gateway to expose their services. Your job is to create an API, define a resource, set up a method, and validate the setup. Here’s how to proceed:
Endpoint Type: Select Regional.
Create a Resource in actions
Create a Get Method
Configure the method: Integration type: Select Mock (for testing purposes). Leave other settings as default.
Integration type: Select Mock (for testing purposes).
Leave other settings as default.
Test the method: Click Test in the method setup pane. Click the Test button and verify a successful response (e.g., 200 status code with a mock response).
Click Test in the method setup pane.
Click the Test button and verify a successful response (e.g., 200 status code with a mock response).
Deploy the API: Create a new stage (e.g., dev). Deploy.
Create a new stage (e.g., dev).
Deploy.
Note the Invoke URL for the deployed API (e.g., https://<api-id>.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dev/items).
Confirm the API is created with the resource /items and the GET method.
Verify the API is deployed to the dev stage and the invoke URL returns a successful response.
Click Validate in the lab console to check the setup.
Sign out of AWS by clicking your username (top-right) and selecting Sign out.
Click End Lab in the lab console to complete the lab.
